name: Italian Stuffed Meat Loaf from Loren Martin
recipeIngredient: 10 lb Ground turkey, chicken, or Beef
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix ground meat with stuffing mixes, 1 can spaghetti sauce, chopped onions, Parmesan cheese, eggs, Worcestershire sauce, basil, oregano, dill, tarragon, diced tomatoes with green chilies, horseradish, garlic powder.
2. Place half of the mixture into a greased roasting pan.
3. Combine zucchini squash, mushrooms, olives, and half of the mozzarella cheese in a separate bowl and place on top of the meat mixture.
4. Add the remaining half of the reserved meat mixture to the stuffing-filled bottom and seal the edges.
5. Sprinkle the remainder of shredded mozzarella cheese and the second can of spaghetti sauce over the top.
6. Bake in a 350 degree oven for about 1 1/2 hours, or until done.
7. Add extra mozzarella cheese and sliced olives to the loaf before serving!
